name: Ballistica
description: The Ballistica crossbow features a unique dual firing mechanism. Choose between a four bolt volley or a deadly accurate charged shot.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: The Ballistica crossbow features a unique dual firing mechanism. Choose between a four bolt volley or a deadly accurate charged shot.

components.name: Gallium
components.description:
Soft metal used in microelectronics and energy weapons.

Location: Mars and Uranus

components.name: Nano Spores
components.description:
Fibrous technocyte tumour. Handle Infested tissue with caution.

Location: Saturn, Neptune, Eris, and Deimos

components.name: Neurodes
components.description:
Biotech sensor organ harvested from Infested entities.

Location: Earth, Lua, Eris, and Deimos

components.name: Rubedo
components.description:
A jagged crystalline ore. Gives off radiant energy.

Location: Earth, Lua, Phobos, Europa, Pluto, Sedna, and the Void

patchlogs.name: Operation: Scarlet Spear: 27.3.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Ballistica firing its arrows sideways when equipped with the Dali Skin.

patchlogs.name: Warframe Revised: Update 27.2.0
patchlogs.changes: Projectiles from Crossbows equipped with the Dali Ballistica Skin will now match the Skin.

patchlogs.name: Empyrean: Kuva Lich Changes 27.1.0 + 27.1.0.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed performance issues with the Ballistica projectile trail FX over long distances.

patchlogs.name: Rising Tide: Update 26.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Ballistica's alt fire ammo not being reloaded properly for Clients if equipped with Mods that reload while holstered (ie. Tactical Reload).

patchlogs.name: The Jovian Concord: Hotfix 25.0.7
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Ballistica (Prime/Rakta), Cernos (Prime), Daikyu, Dread, and Paris Prime Energy color persisting as default on the strings.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Hotfix 22.8.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Ballistica Prime not creating proper ‘Ghost’ on Charged Attack kill.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Update 22.6.0 + Hotfix 22.6.0.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Ballistica Prime turning Executioners in Rathuum and Brokers in The Index into ghosts.

patchlogs.name: Hydroid Prime: Update 21.6.1
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed instances of Ballistica Prime not properly spawning ghosts.
Fixed the color of the Prime Ballistica ghosts flickering for Clients. 
Fixed Ballistica Prime not unfolding correctly if no primary is equipped.

patchlogs.name: Update: Specters of the Rail
patchlogs.changes: Adjusted the Market icon size of the Akstilleto and Ballistica.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.13.0: TennoGen, Passives, & Reworks
patchlogs.fixes: •    Fixed incorrect icon sizing of the Akstiletto and Ballistica in the Market.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.5.5 + 18.5.5.1
patchlogs.fixes: •    Fixed the Ballistica's projectile trail not using selected energy color.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.8.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed enemies becoming alert to players using a charged Ballistica shot.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 16.8.1 + 16.8.2
patchlogs.changes: Grineer Forest Camo now works  work on the Rakta Ballistica

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 16.3.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Rakta Ballistica not sitting on Chroma when holstered.

patchlogs.name: Warframe: Sanctuary
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Red Veil allies in Syndicate Missions using the incorrect skin on their Ballistica.

patchlogs.name: Update 15.16 + Tactical Alert!
patchlogs.changes:
Increased charged bolt damage of Rakta Ballistica from 100 to 300.
Increased uncharged bolt damage of Rakta Ballistica from 25 to 75 per bolt.
Rakta Ballistica is now a fully Silent weapon.

patchlogs.name: Update 15.15 + 15.15.01
patchlogs.changes: Ratka Ballistica now deals 30 damage per uncharged bolt. The damage type is broken down to 15 Puncture, 7.5 Impact and 7.5 Slash.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 15.13.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue where Red Veil Syndicate allies in missions were using Kunai instead of Rakta Ballistica.

patchlogs.name: Update 15.13
patchlogs.changes:
The following changes have been made to the Rakta Ballistica.  Future adjustments may continue to be made, and feedback on any weapon are encouraged to be posted in the appropriate subforum.
Rakta Ballistica’s crit chance has been buffed from 15 to 20 on charge.
Ratka Ballistica’s damage on charge has been changed to 5 Slash, 5 Impact, 90 Puncture.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 15.1.3
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed an issue with the Ballistica where it would only burst fire on the first attempt. After that the "tap fire" would only shoot once.
Fixed an issue where Ballistica’s magazines floated after reloading.

patchlogs.name: Update 10.4.0
patchlogs.changes: A one-handed crossbow featuring a unique dual-firing mechanism, the Ballistica allows you to choose between a four bolt volley or a deadly accurate charged shot. As it is a secondary weapon, the Ballistica can be paired with the Paris compound bow for a lethal load out. Take aim and pin your enemy to the wall!
